notes: Modeled estimate; not actual analytics traffic.
Assumes serious SEO + AEO execution rather than passive publishing.
BOFU terms move first, MOFU compounds next, and TOFU authority layers in over time.
Use first-party analytics to calibrate conversion assumptions.
Displayed monthly trajectory values should be rounded to whole numbers for planning readability.

founderReadableSummary: Total search opportunity is the full validated market demand across Google and AI discovery.
Expected traffic in 12 months assumes strong execution against the highest-value BOFU, MOFU, and TOFU wedges.
Aggressive upside reflects what happens if the company wins its initial wedge early and compounds faster across the year.

tracks.name: Measurement + prompt ops

roiCalculatorDefaults.formula: EstimatedCustomers = ReachableVisits × VisitToCustomerRate; RevenuePotential = EstimatedCustomers × CustomerLTV

| **TikTok** | Viral Reach | $500–$1,000 per 1M views | Free (plus TikTok Shop fees) |
| **Substack** | Writers/Newsletters | 90% of sub revenue | 10% Flat fee |
| **Beehiiv** | Scaled Newsletters | Subscription + Ad Network | Monthly fee ($0–$100+) |
| **Patreon** | Membership Tiers | Recurring fan support | 5%–12% Commission |
